title: Implement Changes
description: Implement the changes based on the bearings step.

title: Understand Task and Plan Bearings
description: Understand the task, explore the codebase, and plan the implementation.

comments.author: Max Collier
comments.text:
## Bearings: ccr-metrics-verify

Finding: configService not available in metrics plugin scope. The hop label always defaults to 'local' regardless of PROXY_HOP config.

Root cause: fastify.configService is only decorated inside child namespace scopes (registerNamespace '/'). The metrics plugin uses fastify-plugin which runs at the parent (root) scope, where configService is undefined.

Fix plan:
1. packages/core/src/plugins/metrics.ts: Add hop?: string to MetricsOptions; change hop derivation to opts.hop first
2. packages/server/src/index.ts: In registerPluginsFromConfig case 'metrics', pass hop: config.PROXY_HOP
3. packages/core/src/plugins/metrics.test.ts (new): Test default hop='local' and configured hop='gascity'
